schema.description: Request body for adding or updating custom metadata on a document

customMetadata.description: Array of custom metadata key-value pairs

items.description: Describes the custom properties of the object.

value.description: Must be a string, a number (for INT properties), or an array of strings. A boolean is not valid. When OpenAPI Generator supports `oneOf`, we can semantically enforce this.

items.title: CustomProperty

schema.title: CustomMetadataPutRequest
